description:

name:
Monty
(assigned to adopter)
description:
1 year old / male / indoor
Meet Monty - a charming, gentle boy with a quiet nature and a playful streak.

Monty is a well-behaved and easy-going cat who enjoys the simple things in life. He’s a great eater and not at all fussy, though his absolute favourite treats are HiLife chicken breast snacks!

name:
Limey
(assigned to adopter)
description:
3 months old / male / indoor
Meet Limey - a playful, curious little explorer who loves being wherever you are. He’ll happily trail along behind you, then curl up for head snuggles when it’s time to rest. He's a real cuddler!

 

Although Limey is a mega foodie who will always cherish mealtimes and treats, he balances this with an active lifestyle of chasing his wand toy with boundless enthusiasm.

 

Full of charm and energy, he’d thrive in a home with another feline friend to share in his daily

name: Woody
description:
11 years old / male / indoor
Introducing Woody - a sweet old soul looking for a place to call home as he retires.

​​

Putting the hype in hypertension and the art in arthritis, Woody is a gentle little man with a big heart.

Since being fostered 5 months ago, he has slowly accepted human love again and has never lashed out despite initially being very shy. He is now dangerously addicted to getting his head scratched and despite spending most of his days curled up in his little bed with his toy

name:
Melody
(assigned to adopter)
description:
1 year old / female / indoor
Meet Melody - the chatty cat who will sing her way into your heart!

 

Melody is a truly gentle cat who loves to be near her people. She is the kind of companion who always wants to stay close to you - whether that's joining you on the sofa to watch TV or squeezing herself onto the chair behind you while you're working.​

description:
3 months old / females / indoor
Dewey and Goose are the cheeky duo who are always up to something.

 

Dewey is the ultimate purr machine. The second you start patting her, the purring switches on and doesn’t stop. She’s always the first to come over for a cuddle and will happily spend hours soaking up the attention. description:
2 years old / male / indoor
This sweet boy has truly blossomed in his foster home. He began a little shy and skittish, but with patience and love he’s revealed his gentle, affectionate soul. Now he’s a friendly little shadow who happily greets you when you come home and enjoys being part of your everyday routine.

​

He’s wonderfully well-mannered — never naughty or messy — with absolutely perfect litter habits. He loves his scratching post, goes wild for treats, and adores his catnip toys. Whil

description:
5 years old / female / indoor
Rush is a very affectionate girl who loves being close to her people. She’ll happily cuddle up beside you in bed, on the couch, and sometimes even follow you into the bathroom just to keep you company. Her purrs have a magical quality, and before you know it you may find yourself opening another packet of Dreamies just for her.

(assigned to adopter)2 years old / male / indoor Oliver is a very sweet boy with so much love to give. They were rescued separately but bonded instantly — total opposites attract energy!​

name: ​banksy & micah
description:
​Banksy & Micah2 years & 6 months old / males / indoor Meet Banksy and Micah!


This lowkey duo have become inseparable while in foster care together.

Banksy (black & white) is a very mellow, easy going boy who enjoys playing with little Micah. He likes to sleep in a sunny spot, be pet, and sometimes held. He has helped bring Micah out of his shell and become more confident.
